zh.Woolverstone, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可武爾福斯東
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Mournings於1608年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Peter Mournings28歲，母親Abigail Brock28歲。她於1635年10月12日與John Cloyes在英國素福爾可武爾福斯東結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Mournings于1608年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Peter Mournings28岁，母亲Abigail Brock28岁。她于1635年10月12日与John Cloyes在英国素福爾可武爾福斯東结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1656年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mournings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Murnin   or   Murnane  . This surname is rare in Britain and Ireland, and is found mainly in Cumbria, England. Compare   Morning  .

variants.name: Murnin
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirnín ‘descendant of Muirnín’, a diminutive of the personal name Muirne, which means ‘high-spirited, festive’ from muirn ‘mirth, affection’. Compare Morning and Mourning .

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Mournings was born in 1608, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter Mournings, was 28 and her mother, Abigail Brock, was 28. She married John Cloyes on 12 October 1635, in Woolverstone, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1656, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Mournings est née en 1608, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Mournings, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Abigail Brock, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Cloyes le 12 octobre 1635, à Woolverstone, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1656, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Mourningsが1608年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Peter Mourningsは28歳，母Abigail Brockは28歳であった。1635年10月12日にイギリススフォルクウルバーストーンでJohn Cloyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1656年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで48歳で死去した。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Mournings(이)가 1608년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Mournings(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Brock(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1635년 10월 12일 영국 수폴크 보버스톤에서 John Cloyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1656년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Mournings nasceu em 1608, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Mournings, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Brock, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cloyes em 12 de outubro de 1635, em Woolverstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1656, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Mournings родилась в 1608 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter Mournings было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Brock, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cloyes 12 октября 1635 г. в местности вулвирстоун, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1656 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Mournings nació en 1608, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Mournings, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Abigail Brock, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Cloyes el 12 de octubre de 1635, en Woolverstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1656, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 48 años.
